description: Access applications and policies. Sync with: npm run sync:access

applications.name: LLM API
applications.notes: Protects Ollama API. Service token used by plot-generator for server-side calls.

applications.name: OpenCode IDE
applications.notes: Protected by custom Worker auth (site-auth), NOT by Access email challenge. Remove any Access policies for this hostname.

applications.name: OpenCode IDE (Mac)
applications.notes: Mac Mini OpenCode instance. Direct tunnel — no site-auth worker. Protected by Cloudflare Access email auth.
